steps: Go to https://app.lemlist.com/ and log in to your account
Click on 'Settings' in the left sidebar
Click 'Generate' to create a new API key
Copy the API key immediately — it is shown only once
The key is used with HTTP Basic Auth: use any string as the username and the API key as the password

credential_fields.name: api_key
credential_fields.label: API Key
credential_fields.description: Your Lemlist API key from Settings > Team > Integrations. Used as the password in HTTP Basic Auth.

notes: The API key is shown only once after generation — save it immediately
Authentication uses HTTP Basic Auth: empty username + API key as password
Paid plan required to use the API (no free tier for API access)
Enrichment features (finding emails/phones) consume credits from your plan

test_endpoint.description: Returns team information for the authenticated account
